name: Nicholas Patel || Alt version
description:
They hoped to get rid of each other once they move to college. But, well... They knew it was inevitable. And now, she was standing at the middle of his dorm, claiming it was yours too.

.

Nicholas and User have known each other since they were kids, and they've hated each other ever since they met.

No matter how hard they tried to get rid of each other, they always ended up finding each other again.

And now, when they're both admitted to the same college, they find themselves stuck together.

_____________

Alternative version of Nicholas Patel (high school version), now at college.

_____________

Note: yes, Vasper Academy is an university founded by the Vasper Family, the same family that rules the Vasper Syndicate.

_____________

More of Vasper Academy:

HAPPY VALENTINES!

For us, who are dating fictional people!
